milestones.label: Falcon 1 Orbit
milestones.meaning: A private liquid-fuel rocket reaches orbit and proves the ascent path.
milestones.visual: thin launch line breaks above the atmosphere

milestones.label: Dragon Returns
milestones.meaning: A commercial spacecraft completes orbit and re-entry.
milestones.visual: capsule arc returns through a green telemetry corridor

milestones.label: First Stage Landing
milestones.meaning: A rocket stage returns from orbital launch and lands upright.
milestones.visual: descending booster line locks onto landing pad

milestones.label: Crew Dragon
milestones.meaning: Commercial crew flight restores human launch capability from the United States.
milestones.visual: two crew dots cross a mission-control board

milestones.label: Starship Catch
milestones.meaning: The system begins testing catch-and-reuse operations at massive scale.
milestones.visual: tower arms catch a returning silhouette

milestones.label: System Ambition
milestones.meaning: The narrative shifts from single missions to launch-system capacity.
milestones.visual: many arcs form a reusable transport network
